mapper.select: SELECT planner_id AS plannerId, user_id AS userId, title, plan_data AS planData, is_public AS isPublic, created_at AS createdAt FROM planners WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT planner_id AS plannerId, user_id AS userId, title, plan_data AS planData, is_public AS isPublic, created_at AS createdAt FROM planners WHERE planner_id = #{plannerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO planners (user_id, title, plan_data, is_public) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{planData}, #{isPublic})
mapper.update: UPDATE planners SET title = #{title}, plan_data = #{planData} WHERE planner_id = #{plannerId}
UPDATE planners SET is_public = #{isPublic} WHERE planner_id = #{plannerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO planner_collaborators (planner_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{plannerId}, #{userId}, #{role})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM planner_collaborators WHERE planner_id = #{plannerId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.collaborator_id AS collaboratorId, c.planner_id AS plannerId, c.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.nickname, c.role, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM planner_collaborators c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.planner_id = #{plannerId}
SELECT count(*) FROM planner_collaborators WHERE planner_id = #{plannerId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.planner_id AS plannerId, p.user_id AS userId, p.title, p.plan_data AS planData, p.is_public AS isPublic, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM planners p JOIN planner_collaborators c ON p.planner_id = c.planner_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
